flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Ocean County Vocational-Technical School rose 102% between 2006 and 2009 (47.6% → 96.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ocean County Vocational-Technical School fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Ocean County Vocational-Technical School rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (435 → 497).
